final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement mockup for OPPO Find X9 Ultra new product launch, designed as a brand-exposure campaign visual for web/social feed display.

Style/medium: smartphone screenshot mockup, full-screen brand campaign ad, high-impact visual
Composition: full-bleed vertical layout filling the entire 1080×1920 screen, bold hero product placement centered, strong visual hierarchy for brand exposure
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as hero product, new launch announcement
Scene/backdrop: dramatic dark or gradient backdrop that amplifies visual impact and product silhouette
Lighting/mood: striking, high-contrast dramatic lighting to maximize visual impact and brand presence
Color palette: OPPO brand tones — deep black or midnight gradient with premium accent highlights
Materials/textures: sleek glass and metal smartphone surface, polished reflections
Text (verbatim): OPPO Find X9 Ultra
Constraints: 1080×1920 portrait format, full-screen ad layout, no notch or status bar interruption, brand-exposure priority
Avoid: cluttered layout, small text, low-contrast elements, generic tech-ad clichés, watermarks
